'''Darstell 4''' was a relatively peaceful [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]], which was situated on a minor shipping lane. The primary continental mass consisted mainly of softly rolling hills. Most of the small settlements spread across the planet's surface managed to maintain a level of homeostasis with the surrounding environment. It was, at one point in its history, under the control of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Bellows]], who ruled from the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Symt]]. The Imperials were able to keep order with a minimum of strong-arming, and the travelers along the trade route did little to bother the natives.
